hooks.hook_text: Còn 6 tuần nộp hồ sơ, Speaking vẫn 5.5?
hooks.why_it_works: Opens on the deadline PUSH (A1) + the sourced stuck-Speaking wall (A2, validated vs S2) in the first 2s so Thảo self-selects instantly; inherits the brief territory 'Còn kịp, nếu biết luyện đúng'. Ladder is a prediction, not a measurement.

hooks.hook_text: Bạn vẫn kịp đạt band cần — nếu luyện đúng.
hooks.why_it_works: Compresses the brief SMP's reassurance ('still in time, if you practise right') into the hook — pays off A1 panic with the A4 roadmap PULL; predicted attention proxy, never asserted as proven.

hooks.hook_text: Mỗi ngày luyện gì để kịp band trước hạn?
hooks.why_it_works: Names the daily-planning gap from the SMP ('biết chính xác mỗi ngày phải luyện gì', A4) as a question — AIDA attention for cold; defuses the free-app drift with a one-tap check. Recombines cta C4a onto a new hook/body. Predicted ladder.

hooks.hook_text: Writing bị trừ điểm mà không biết sai đâu?
hooks.why_it_works: Leads on the stuck-Writing half of the A2 wall (no feedback loop) toward the roadmap PULL (A4); recombines body B4a with a Writing-specific CTA to show the same body works across CTAs. Predicted ladder, not measured.

hooks.hook_text: Từ 6.0 lên band mình cần, có lộ trình rõ.
hooks.why_it_works: Before->after on Thảo's own 6.0 starting point (A4, validated modal 6.0 vs S2) to a named-band roadmap — BAB; the '6.0' is her learner-state framing, not a PrepEdu outcome claim, so claim_refs stays empty. Recombines body B4b with cta C4b. Predicted attention proxy.
